title: GrowGeneration Reports Record Third Quarter 2020 Financial Results
text: GrowGeneration Q3 2020 Record Results. Q3 2020 continued company's strong growth trajectory with record quarterly revenues. Cannabis industry expanding rapidly with state legalization driving demand. Retail expansion progressing with new locations added across states. E-commerce growth acceleration. Gross margins remained healthy. Company maintained raise-and-beat pattern. Strong cash generation funded growth initiatives. Operating leverage beginning to show as expenses scaled slower than revenue. Management optimistic on 2021 guidance with expectations for continued strong growth. Proprietary brands gaining traction with retailers.
